welcome_message: Welcome to Foo Zoo, where wildlife conservation meets educational excellence! We are dedicated to providing an unforgettable experience for visitors of all ages while supporting global conservation efforts and protecting endangered species for future generations to enjoy and learn from.
emergency_announcement: Attention all visitors: In case of any emergency situation, please remain calm and follow the instructions provided by our trained zoo staff members. Emergency exits are clearly marked throughout the facility, and first aid stations are available at multiple locations for your safety and peace of mind.
conservation_mission: Our mission at Foo Zoo extends far beyond entertainment - we are committed to wildlife conservation, scientific research, and environmental education. Through our breeding programs, habitat restoration projects, and community outreach initiatives, we work tirelessly to protect endangered species and their natural habitats around the world.
visitor_guidelines: To ensure the safety and well-being of both our animals and visitors, please follow all posted guidelines during your visit. This includes maintaining appropriate distances from animal enclosures, refraining from feeding animals unless specifically permitted, and supervising children at all times throughout the zoo grounds.
accessibility_statement: Foo Zoo is committed to providing equal access and enjoyment for all visitors, regardless of physical abilities. Our facilities include wheelchair-accessible pathways, accessible restrooms, designated parking spaces, and specialized programs designed to accommodate visitors with various accessibility needs and requirements.
group_visit_info: Planning a group visit to Foo Zoo? We offer special group rates for parties of {{min_group_size}} or more people, including educational programs, guided tours, and customized experiences tailored to your group's interests and age range. Contact our group sales department at least {{booking_days}} days in advance to secure your preferred date and time.
seasonal_hours_notice: Please note that zoo operating hours vary by season and may be subject to change due to weather conditions or special events. During peak season ({{peak_start}} through {{peak_end}}), we are open from {{peak_hours}}. Off-season hours are {{offseason_hours}}. We recommend checking our website or calling ahead to confirm current operating hours before your visit.
